name: Instagram Ad Interests
description: Advertisers the user has interacted with, ad topic interests, and targeting categories sourced from Meta Accounts Center.

advertisers.description: Advertisers shown in the user's Accounts Center, deduplicated across the recently-interacted, saved, recommended, and all-advertisers collections

sources.description: Which Accounts Center collections this advertiser appeared in

id.description: Advertiser id from the all-advertisers collection

page_id.description: Linked Facebook page id, when available

image_url.description: Alternate advertiser image URL from advertisers_data_v2

ad_image_url.description: URL of a recent ad creative from this advertiser

display_title.description: Headline shown on the recent ad

token.description: Opaque tracking token attached to the collection node

fb_follows_count.description: Number of Facebook followers, when available

is_hidden.description: True if the advertiser has been hidden by the user

ad_topics.description: Activity-derived ad topic interests shown in Accounts Center

id.description: Topic id from the preloader payload, when present

raw.description: Raw topic object from the SSR preloader, preserved for forward compatibility

categories.description: Targeting categories advertisers use to reach the user

description.description: Long-form category description shown in Accounts Center

cluster_id.description: Cluster identifier this category belongs to

is_enabled.description: True if the category is currently enabled for ad targeting
